characters.appearance: Male, 30s, medium build, brown complexion, short black hair, mustache.
characters.wardrobe: Khaki uniform shirt with a white and pink checked cloth draped over his shoulder.
characters.demeanor: Talkative, cheerful, oblivious to the passenger's need for quiet.

characters.appearance: Male, 20s, medium build, brown complexion, short black hair, beard, wears glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Black and white plaid button-down shirt.
characters.demeanor: Focused, slightly annoyed, trying to be quiet while working.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Sir, sarkar ke baare me kya khayal hai apka? Haanji? [Sir, what are your thoughts on the government? Yes?]
Character B says: Bhaiya, bas ek second. [Brother, just one second.]
Character B says: Good morning sir, my name is... [Good morning sir, my name is...]
Character A says: Dekh rahe ho sir, road kitne badhiya ban gaye hain. [Are you seeing sir, how good the roads have become.]
Character A says: Chand pe jaane ki zarurat hi nahi hain hume. [We don't even need to go to the moon.]
Character B says: I have three years of experience in sales, and I am very hardworking. [I have three years of experience in sales, and I am very hardworking.]
Character A says: Batao sir. [Tell me sir.]
Character A says: Aisa lagta hain sir traffic rules ki koi zarurat nahi hamare desh pe.. [It feels like there is no need for traffic rules in our country..]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes a relatable, chaotic everyday Indian setting (an auto ride).
- Shows the user utilizing idle travel time to practice English speaking for an interview.
- Highlights the app's utility for on-the-go, private practice despite external distractions.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:

Chand pe jaane ki zarurat hi nahi hain hume.

Aisa lagta hain sir traffic rules ki koi zarurat nahi hamare desh pe..

scenes.scene_summary:
- Focuses on the app interface to show the AI tutor's real-time feedback.
- Reinforces the message that you can practice speaking without fear of judgment.
- Pays off the user's effort with a positive, encouraging result.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
AI Tutor: Great job! Your pronunciation is improving.
Practice English anywhere, anytime.

- Positions Supernova as the practical, everyday tool for confident English speaking.
